name: absent
source: n/a — the absence of a component is not adopted from anywhere
description: This layer has no such component at all: nothing renders, there is no element for a requirement to hold or fail against. Distinct from `none`, which is a real, rendered component that simply offers no interactive affordance -- `none` still has a surface a requirement could in principle apply to; `absent` has no surface to apply anything to. Binding this REQUIRES a reason, because the whole purpose of this layer is that 'nothing recorded', 'verified presentational' and 'does not exist here' must all read differently.
